content:
🔥 KrillinAI | Go
🎯 Primary Use Case: Automated video translation and dubbing for creating multilingual, cross-platform video content.
✨ Key Features: • One-click deployment and operation • Video acquisition via yt-dlp or local upload • High-accuracy speech recognition (Whisper) • LLM-powered subtitle segmentation and translation • Professional vocabulary replacement
📖 Summary: KrillinAI is a Go-based tool for video translation and dubbing, offering end-to-end localization for cross-platform content. It supports over 100 languages, integrates speech recognition and LLM-based translation, and features voice cloning for professional-sounding dubs.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
